hooks.prompt:
The following file was just written or edited: $ARGUMENTS

Review the change and determine if it establishes, modifies, or removes a project rule or convention (e.g. code style, architecture pattern, naming convention, folder structure, RIBs usage, etc.).

If a rule changed, update /Users/ssun/Desktop/Git/KurlyHomework/CLAUDE.md to reflect it — add new rules, update changed ones, or remove obsolete ones. Keep the existing structure and writing style of CLAUDE.md.

If no rule changed, do nothing.
